<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>VERITAS v3 — DLH Kabupaten Timor Tengah Selatan</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Sora:wght@700;800;900&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<style>
:root{
  --bb:#8FD9FB;--bb2:#5BBEF2;--bb3:#2A9ED8;--bb4:#1A78A8;--bb5:#135E84;--bb6:#0C3E58;
  --bb-bg:#EEF7FD;--bb-border:#C5E9F8;
  --success:#28C76F;--success-bg:#E3F9ED;
  --warning:#FF9F43;--warning-bg:#FFF4E5;
  --danger:#EA5455;--danger-bg:#FDEAEA;
  --gray-50:#F7F9FB;--gray-100:#EBF0F5;--gray-200:#D0DCE7;
  --gray-400:#7A93A8;--gray-600:#4A6070;--gray-900:#152030;
  --border:#D8E8F2;--text:#152030;--muted:#5A7A90;
  --sidebar-w:268px;
  --r:12px;--r-sm:8px;--r-lg:16px;
  --shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(20,80,120,.08),0 1px 3px rgba(20,80,120,.05);
  --shadow-lg:0 8px 32px rgba(20,80,120,.13),0 2px 8px rgba(20,80,120,.07);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}
body{background:var(--gray-50);color:var(--text);}

/* ====== LOGIN ====== */
#loginPage{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--bb6) 0%,var(--bb5) 30%,var(--bb4) 60%,var(--bb3) 85%,var(--bb) 100%);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.login-dots{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.12) 1.5px,transparent 1.5px);background-size:28px 28px;}
.login-blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);pointer-events:none;}
.lb1{width:500px;height:500px;top:-180px;left:-180px;background:rgba(143,217,251,.15);}
.lb2{width:600px;height:600px;bottom:-220px;right:-200px;background:rgba(12,62,88,.3);}
.lb3{width:200px;height:200px;top:40%;left:55%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
.login-card{position:relative;z-index:2;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:22px;padding:44px 40px 36px;width:100%;max-width:430px;backdrop-filter:blur(24px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px);box-shadow:0 28px 72px rgba(0,0,0,.28);text-align:center;}
.lc-icon-wrap{width:68px;height:68px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,var(--bb),var(--bb3));border-radius:20px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:18px;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(143,217,251,.45);}
.lc-icon-wrap i{font-size:32px;color:#fff;}
.lc-eyebrow{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-bottom:4px;}
.lc-app{font-family:'Sora',sans-serif;font-size:34px;font-weight:900;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1;}
.lc-fullname{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:rgba(143,217,251,.9);margin-top:7px;line-height:1.55;}
.lc-org{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.32);margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.lc-divider{height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);margin:0 0 20px;}
.lc-role-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:10px;display:block;text-align:left;}
.role-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.role-card{border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);}
.role-card:hover{border-color:rgba(143,217,251,.6);background:rgba(143,217,251,.12);}
.role-card.selected{border-color:var(--bb);background:rgba(143,217,251,.2);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(143,217,251,.3);}
.role-card i{font-size:17px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-bottom:6px;display:block;}
.role-card.selected i{color:var(--bb);}
.role-card span{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);}
.role-card.selected span{color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);}
.lc-input-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:0 14px;margin-bottom:12px;transition:all .15s;}
.lc-input-wrap:focus-within{border-color:rgba(143,217,251,.7);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(143,217,251,.18);}
.lc-input-wrap i{color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:15px;flex-shrink:0;}
.lc-input-wrap input{flex:1;background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:#fff;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:14px;padding:12px 0;}
.lc-input-wrap input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);}
.lc-btn{width:100%;padding:13px;margin-top:4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb),var(--bb3));color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.3px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(42,158,216,.4);transition:all .2s;}
.lc-btn:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb3),var(--bb5));transform:translateY(-1px);}
.lc-error{font-size:12px;color:#ffb3b3;background:rgba(234,84,85,.15);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;margin-top:8px;display:none;text-align:center;}
.lc-hint{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.28);margin-top:14px;line-height:1.8;}
.lc-hint code{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;color:rgba(143,217,251,.75);font-size:11px;}
.lc-version{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);margin-top:12px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;}

/* ====== LAYOUT ====== */
.wrapper{display:flex;min-height:100vh;}

/* ====== SIDEBAR ====== */
.sidebar{width:var(--sidebar-w);background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bb6) 0%,var(--bb5) 100%);color:white;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:100vh;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;z-index:100;border-right:1px solid rgba(143,217,251,.08);}
.sidebar-brand{padding:22px 20px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);text-align:center;}
.brand-icon-wrap{width:52px;height:52px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,var(--bb),var(--bb3));border-radius:14px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:10px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(143,217,251,.35);}
.brand-icon-wrap i{font-size:24px;color:#fff;}
.brand-name{font-family:'Sora',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:1px;color:white;}
.brand-sub{font-size:10px;opacity:.55;line-height:1.6;margin-top:3px;}
.sidebar-inst{padding:10px 16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);font-size:10px;text-align:center;opacity:.7;line-height:1.6;}
.menu{padding:12px 10px;flex:1;}
.menu-label{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;opacity:.4;padding:10px 8px 4px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.menu-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:2px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;transition:background .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);}
.menu-item i{width:17px;text-align:center;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0;}
.menu-item:hover{background:rgba(143,217,251,.12);color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);}
.menu-item.active{background:rgba(143,217,251,.2);color:var(--bb);font-weight:600;border-left:2px solid var(--bb);padding-left:10px;}
.menu-item .badge-dot{margin-left:auto;background:var(--danger);color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px;min-width:22px;text-align:center;}
.sidebar-user{padding:12px 14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.12);}
.su-av{width:34px;height:34px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb),var(--bb3));border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.su-av i{font-size:16px;color:#fff;}
.su-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.su-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.su-role{font-size:10px;color:rgba(143,217,251,.5);}
.su-out{background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:15px;padding:4px;border-radius:5px;transition:all .15s;flex-shrink:0;}
.su-out:hover{color:var(--danger);background:rgba(234,84,85,.1);}
.sidebar-footer{padding:8px 16px 12px;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);text-align:center;line-height:1.7;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;}

/* ====== MAIN ====== */
.main{margin-left:var(--sidebar-w);width:calc(100% - var(--sidebar-w));display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh;}

/* ====== TOPBAR ====== */
.topbar{background:white;padding:0 24px;height:60px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(20,80,120,.05);}
.topbar-left h1{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--bb5);}
.topbar-left p{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.sync-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--bb-bg);border:1px solid var(--bb-border);padding:4px 12px;border-radius:100px;font-size:11px;color:var(--bb4);font-weight:600;}
.sync-pill i{font-size:11px;}
.date-badge{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:var(--gray-50);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:4px 12px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.user-info{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.user-avatar{width:32px;height:32px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb4),var(--bb3));border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-size:13px;}
.user-detail small{display:block;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);}
.user-detail strong{display:block;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);}
.logout-btn{background:none;border:1.5px solid var(--border);padding:5px 12px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);transition:all .15s;}
.logout-btn:hover{border-color:var(--danger);color:var(--danger);}

/* ====== CONTENT ====== */
.content{padding:20px;flex:1;}
.page{display:none;}
.page.active{display:block;}

/* ====== INSTANSI HEADER ====== */
.instansi-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb6),var(--bb5));border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:18px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:18px;color:#fff;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
.inst-emblem{width:54px;height:54px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:var(--r);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);}
.inst-emblem i{font-size:26px;color:var(--bb);}
.inst-text .il1{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.65;}
.inst-text .il2{font-family:'Sora',sans-serif;font-size:19px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.3px;margin-top:2px;}
.inst-text .il3{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;opacity:.8;}
.inst-text .il4{font-size:11px;opacity:.55;margin-top:2px;}

/* ====== STAT CARDS ====== */
.stat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:18px;}
.stat-card{background:white;border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px 16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);position:relative;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s;}
.stat-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.stat-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:3px;}
.stat-card.blue::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--bb3),var(--bb));}
.stat-card.green::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1A9E55,#28C76F);}
.stat-card.orange::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#D97706,#FF9F43);}
.stat-card.red::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#C93A3A,#EA5455);}
.stat-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:7px;}
.stat-number{font-family:'Sora',sans-serif;font-size:34px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:4px;}
.stat-card.blue .stat-number{color:var(--bb4);}
.stat-card.green .stat-number{color:#1A9E55;}
.stat-card.orange .stat-number{color:#D97706;}
.stat-card.red .stat-number{color:#C93A3A;}
.stat-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.stat-icon{position:absolute;right:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:32px;opacity:.07;}

/* ====== PANELS ====== */
.dash-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.panel{background:white;border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:16px;}
.panel-title{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bb4);margin-bottom:14px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--bb-bg);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
.panel-title i{font-size:13px;color:var(--bb3);}
.panel-header-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--bb-bg);}
.panel-header-row .panel-title{margin-bottom:0;border-bottom:none;padding-bottom:0;}

/* ====== MAP ====== */
#leafletMap{height:320px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);}

/* ====== RINGKASAN ====== */
.ringkasan-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:9px;}
.ring-item{background:var(--bb-bg);border:1px solid var(--bb-border);border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:12px 14px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.ring-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;}
.ring-value{font-family:'Sora',sans-serif;font-size:21px;font-weight:800;color:var(--bb4);}

/* ====== STORAGE BAR ====== */
.storage-bar-wrap{background:var(--gray-100);border-radius:100px;height:7px;overflow:hidden;margin:6px 0;}
.storage-bar{height:100%;border-radius:100px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--bb),var(--bb3));transition:width .6s ease;}
.storage-info{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}

/* ====== TABLE ====== */
.table-wrap{overflow-x:auto;}
table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12.5px;}
table th{background:var(--bb-bg);padding:9px 12px;text-align:left;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bb4);border-bottom:2px solid var(--bb-border);white-space:nowrap;}
table td{padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:middle;}
table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
table tr.clickable-row{cursor:pointer;transition:background .12s;}
table tr.clickable-row:hover td{background:var(--bb-bg);}

/* ====== BADGES ====== */
.badge{padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2px;white-space:nowrap;}
.badge-success{background:var(--success-bg);color:#1A9E55;}
.badge-warning{background:var(--warning-bg);color:#924010;}
.badge-danger{background:var(--danger-bg);color:#C93A3A;}
.badge-info{background:var(--bb-bg);color:var(--bb5);}

/* ====== UPLOAD TABS ====== */
.upload-tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:20px;background:var(--bb-bg);border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:4px;border:1px solid var(--bb-border);}
.upload-tab{flex:1;padding:9px 16px;border:none;background:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);transition:all .15s;}
.upload-tab.active{background:white;color:var(--bb4);box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(20,80,120,.1);}
.upload-panel{display:none;}
.upload-panel.active{display:block;}
.upload-area{border:2px dashed var(--bb-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:32px;text-align:center;background:var(--bb-bg);}
.upload-area p{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.csv-example{background:#1A2E40;color:#E2ECF4;border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:14px 16px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11.5px;line-height:1.8;margin-top:16px;text-align:left;overflow-x:auto;}
.csv-example .header-row{color:#8FD9FB;font-weight:bold;}
.csv-example .data-row{color:#86EFAC;}

/* ====== FORM ====== */
.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;}
.form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;}
.form-group.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
.form-group label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.4px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.form-group input,.form-group select,.form-group textarea{padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid var(--gray-200);border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:13px;outline:none;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;background:#fff;color:var(--text);}
.form-group input:focus,.form-group select:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{border-color:var(--bb3);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(143,217,251,.2);}
.form-group textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:80px;}

/* ====== FOTO SECTION ====== */
.foto-section{grid-column:1/-1;background:var(--bb-bg);border:1.5px solid var(--bb-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:16px;}
.foto-section-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bb4);margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
.foto-actions{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.foto-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:8px 15px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid var(--bb-border);background:white;color:var(--bb4);transition:all .15s;}
.foto-btn:hover{background:var(--bb3);color:#fff;border-color:var(--bb3);}
.foto-btn.primary-foto{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb),var(--bb3));color:#fff;border:none;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(42,158,216,.3);}
.foto-btn.primary-foto:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb3),var(--bb5));}
.foto-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(110px,1fr));gap:9px;}
.foto-thumb{position:relative;border-radius:var(--r-sm);overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:1;border:2px solid var(--bb-border);cursor:pointer;}
.foto-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;}
.foto-thumb .foto-del{position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;width:22px;height:22px;background:rgba(234,84,85,.88);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;color:#fff;border:none;}
.foto-thumb .foto-del:hover{background:var(--danger);}
.foto-thumb .foto-label{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(0,0,0,.72),transparent);padding:10px 5px 4px;font-size:9px;color:#fff;text-align:center;line-height:1.3;}
.foto-empty{text-align:center;padding:18px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;grid-column:1/-1;}
.foto-empty i{font-size:26px;opacity:.3;display:block;margin-bottom:6px;}
.camera-preview-wrap{display:none;margin-top:12px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);overflow:hidden;border:2px solid var(--bb-border);}
.camera-preview-wrap video{width:100%;display:block;max-height:240px;object-fit:cover;}
.camera-controls{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:9px;}

/* ====== BUTTONS ====== */
.btn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb4),var(--bb3));color:white;border:none;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;}
.btn:hover{opacity:.88;transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-success{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1A9E55,#28C76F);}
.btn-danger{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C93A3A,#EA5455);}
.btn-outline{background:none;border:1.5px solid var(--bb3);color:var(--bb4);padding:8px 16px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:all .15s;}
.btn-outline:hover{background:var(--bb-bg);}
.btn-sm{padding:6px 12px;font-size:11.5px;}
.btn-export{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1A9E55,#28C76F);color:white;border:none;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all .15s;}
.btn-export:hover{opacity:.88;}

/* ====== ALERTS ====== */
.alert{padding:12px 15px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;}
.alert-info{background:var(--bb-bg);border:1px solid var(--bb-border);color:var(--bb5);}
.alert-warning{background:var(--warning-bg);border:1px solid #FFD591;color:#924010;}
.alert-success{background:var(--success-bg);border:1px solid #A7E8C2;color:#1A9E55;}
.alert i{margin-top:1px;flex-shrink:0;}

/* ====== MODAL ====== */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(12,62,88,.45);z-index:999;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(3px);}
.modal-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.modal-box{background:white;border-radius:var(--r-lg);width:720px;max-width:95vw;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.25);border:1px solid var(--bb-border);}
.modal-header{padding:20px 24px 14px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--bb-bg);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;position:sticky;top:0;background:white;z-index:1;border-radius:var(--r-lg) var(--r-lg) 0 0;}
.modal-header h2{font-family:'Sora',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:800;color:var(--bb5);}
.modal-header p{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
.modal-close{background:none;border:none;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;}
.modal-close:hover{background:var(--bb-bg);}
.modal-body{padding:20px 24px;}
.detail-section{margin-bottom:18px;}
.detail-section-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bb4);margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bb-bg);}
.detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:11px;}
.detail-item label{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;display:block;margin-bottom:3px;}
.detail-item p{font-size:13px;color:var(--text);font-weight:500;}
.detail-item.full{grid-column:1/-1;}

/* ====== FOTO VIEWER MODAL ====== */
.foto-viewer-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.88);z-index:1000;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;}
.foto-viewer-overlay.open{display:flex;}
.foto-viewer-box{max-width:92vw;max-height:85vh;text-align:center;position:relative;}
.foto-viewer-box img{max-width:100%;max-height:75vh;border-radius:var(--r);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5);display:block;margin:0 auto;}
.foto-viewer-close{position:fixed;top:18px;right:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:none;color:#fff;font-size:18px;width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .15s;z-index:1001;}
.foto-viewer-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);}
.foto-viewer-caption{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-size:12px;margin-top:10px;}
.foto-viewer-nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:center;}
.foto-viewer-nav button{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:20px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;transition:background .15s;}
.foto-viewer-nav button:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);}
.foto-viewer-counter{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:11px;}

/* ====== SOP ====== */
.sop-step{display:flex;gap:14px;padding:13px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bb-bg);}
.sop-step:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.sop-num{width:33px;height:33px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bb4),var(--bb3));color:white;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0;}
.sop-content h4{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px;color:var(--text);}
.sop-content p{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;}

/* ====== ROADMAP ====== */
.roadmap-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:13px;}
.roadmap-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.rm-check{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;}
.rm-done{background:var(--success-bg);color:#1A9E55;}
.rm-todo{background:var(--gray-100);color:var(--muted);border:2px dashed var(--border);}
.rm-label{font-weight:600;flex:1;}
.rm-label.done{color:var(--text);}
.rm-label.todo{color:var(--muted);}
.rm-tag{font-size:9.5px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;}
.tag-done{background:var(--success-bg);color:#1A9E55;}
.tag-todo{background:var(--gray-100);color:var(--muted);}
.tag-active{background:var(--bb-bg);color:var(--bb4);}

/* ====== TUJUAN LIST ====== */
.tujuan-list{list-style:none;margin-top:8px;}
.tujuan-list li{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:7px 11px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bb-bg);border-radius:var(--r-sm);margin-bottom:5px;border-left:3px solid var(--bb);}
.tujuan-list li i{color:var(--bb3);width:15px;flex-shrink:0;}

/* ====== RESPONSIVE ====== */
@media(max-width:1100px){.stat-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}.dash-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .sidebar{transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .25s;}
  .sidebar.open{transform:translateX(0);}
  .main{margin-left:0;width:100%;}
  .topbar{padding:0 14px;}
  .date-badge,.user-detail{display:none;}
  .content{padding:14px;}
  .stat-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .menu-toggle{display:flex!important;}
}
.menu-toggle{display:none;background:none;border:none;font-size:20px;color:var(--bb5);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;margin-right:4px;}
</style>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="./style-override.css">
</head>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ====== LOGIN ====== -->
<div id="loginPage">
  <div class="login-dots"></div>
  <div class="login-blob lb1"></div>
  <div class="login-blob lb2"></div>
  <div class="login-blob lb3"></div>
  <div class="login-card">
    <div class="lc-icon-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i></div>
    <div class="lc-eyebrow">Sistem Informasi</div>
    <div class="lc-app">VERITAS</div>
    <div class="lc-fullname">Verifikasi dan Inventarisasi Data<br>Persetujuan Lingkungan</div>
    <div class="lc-org">Dinas Lingkungan Hidup — Kab. Timor Tengah Selatan</div>
    <div class="lc-divider"></div>
    <span class="lc-role-label">Masuk sebagai</span>
    <div class="role-cards">
      <div class="role-card selected" onclick="selectRole('pimpinan',this)"><i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i><span>Pimpinan</span></div>
      <div class="role-card" onclick="selectRole('admin',this)"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-shield"></i><span>Admin</span></div>
      <div class="role-card" onclick="selectRole('petugas',this)"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-tie"></i><span>Petugas</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="lc-input-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-user"></i><input id="username" type="text" placeholder="Username" autocomplete="off"></div>
    <div class="lc-input-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-lock"></i><input id="password" type="password" placeholder="Password" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()"></div>
    <div id="loginError" class="lc-error"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i> Username atau password salah.</div>
    <button class="lc-btn" onclick="doLogin()"><i class="fa-solid fa-right-to-bracket"></i> Masuk ke VERITAS</button>
    <div class="lc-hint">
      👑 <code>pimpinan</code> / <code>dlh2025</code>&nbsp;
      🛡️ <code>admin</code> / <code>veritas123</code>&nbsp;
      👷 <code>petugas</code> / <code>petugas123</code>
    </div>
    <div class="lc-version">VERITAS v3.0 · DLH TTS · 2025</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ====== APP ====== -->
<div class="wrapper" id="mainApp" style="display:none;">
  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <div class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-brand">
      <div class="brand-icon-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i></div>
      <div class="brand-name">VERITAS</div>
      <div class="brand-sub">Verifikasi & Inventarisasi<br>Persetujuan Lingkungan</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-inst">Pemerintah Kab. Timor Tengah Selatan<br>Dinas Lingkungan Hidup</div>
    <div class="menu" id="sidebarMenu"></div>
    <div class="sidebar-user">
      <div class="su-av" id="suAv"><i class="fa-solid fa-user"></i></div>
      <div class="su-info">
        <div class="su-name" id="sidebarName">—</div>
        <div class="su-role">DLH Kabupaten TTS</div>
      </div>
      <button class="su-out" onclick="doLogout()" title="Keluar"><i class="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-footer">VERITAS v3.0 © 2025<br>DLH Kab. Timor Tengah Selatan</div>
  </div>

  <!-- MAIN -->
  <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
        <button class="menu-toggle" id="menuToggle" onclick="document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open')"><i class="fa-solid fa-bars"></i></button>
        <div class="topbar-left">
          <h1 id="pageTitle">Dashboard</h1>
          <p>VERITAS — Sistem Informasi Persetujuan Lingkungan</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="topbar-right">
        <div class="sync-pill" id="syncPill"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Tersimpan</div>
        <div class="date-badge"><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar"></i><span id="todayDate"></span></div>
        <div class="user-info">
          <div class="user-avatar" id="userAvatar"><i class="fa-solid fa-user"></i></div>
          <div class="user-detail"><strong id="userDisplayName">—</strong><small id="userRoleDisplay">DLH Kab. TTS</small></div>
        </div>
        <button class="logout-btn" onclick="doLogout()"><i class="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket"></i> Keluar</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="content">

      <!-- ===== DASHBOARD ===== -->
      <div id="page-dashboard" class="page active">
        <div class="instansi-header">
          <div class="inst-emblem"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i></div>
          <div class="inst-text">
            <div class="il1">Pemerintah Kabupaten Timor Tengah Selatan</div>
            <div class="il2">Dinas Lingkungan Hidup</div>
            <div class="il3">VERITAS — Dashboard Eksekutif</div>
            <div class="il4">Verifikasi dan Inventarisasi Data Persetujuan Lingkungan</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-grid">
          <div class="stat-card blue"><div class="stat-label">Total Persetujuan</div><div class="stat-number" id="totalUsaha">0</div><div class="stat-desc">Data OSS &amp; Amdalnet terintegrasi</div><i class="fa-solid fa-file stat-icon"></i></div>
          <div class="stat-card green"><div class="stat-label">Terinventarisasi</div><div class="stat-number" id="totalInventarisasi">0</div><div class="stat-desc">Usaha tercatat lapangan</div><i class="fa-solid fa-map stat-icon"></i></div>
          <div class="stat-card orange"><div class="stat-label">Terverifikasi</div><div class="stat-number" id="totalVerifikasi">0</div><div class="stat-desc">Dokumen &amp; kondisi sesuai</div><i class="fa-solid fa-check stat-icon"></i></div>
          <div class="stat-card red"><div class="stat-label">Ketidaksesuaian KBLI</div><div class="stat-number" id="totalKBLI">0</div><div class="stat-desc">Perlu tindak lanjut segera</div><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation stat-icon"></i></div>
        </div>
        <!-- Storage panel -->
        <div class="panel" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-database"></i> Penyimpanan Lokal Browser</div>
          <div class="storage-info"><span id="storageUsed">Menghitung...</span><span>Kapasitas ~5 MB</span></div>
          <div class="storage-bar-wrap"><div class="storage-bar" id="storageBar" style="width:1%"></div></div>
          <div style="font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info" style="color:var(--bb3);"></i> Semua data (input, verifikasi, foto) tersimpan di browser ini. Tidak memerlukan server atau Google Sheet.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dash-grid">
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-map-location-dot"></i> Peta Sebaran Persetujuan</div>
            <div id="leafletMap"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-pie"></i> Status Persetujuan</div>
            <canvas id="statusChart" style="max-height:185px;"></canvas>
            <div class="panel-title" style="margin-top:14px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-table-list"></i> Ringkasan</div>
            <div class="ringkasan-grid">
              <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Data OSS</div><div class="ring-value">230</div></div></div>
              <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Data Amdalnet</div><div class="ring-value">98</div></div></div>
              <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Sudah Inventarisasi</div><div class="ring-value" id="r-inv">0</div></div></div>
              <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Belum Inventarisasi</div><div class="ring-value" id="r-belum">328</div></div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-header-row">
            <span class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i> Data Prioritas Inventarisasi</span>
            <button class="btn-export btn-sm" onclick="exportTableToCSV('prioritasTable','Data_Prioritas.csv')"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> CSV</button>
          </div>
          <div class="table-wrap">
            <table id="prioritasTable">
              <thead><tr><th>Nama Usaha / Kegiatan</th><th>KBLI</th><th>Kecamatan</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="prioritasBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== UPLOAD DATA ===== -->
      <div id="page-upload" class="page">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-upload"></i> Upload Data OSS / Amdalnet</div>
          <div class="upload-tabs">
            <button class="upload-tab active" onclick="switchUploadTab('csv',this)"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-csv"></i> Upload CSV</button>
            <button class="upload-tab" onclick="switchUploadTab('manual',this)"><i class="fa-solid fa-keyboard"></i> Input Manual</button>
          </div>
          <div id="uploadTabCsv" class="upload-panel active">
            <div class="upload-area">
              <div style="font-size:38px;color:var(--bb3);margin-bottom:10px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-up"></i></div>
              <p>Pilih file CSV hasil ekspor dari sistem OSS atau Amdalnet</p>
              <input type="file" id="csvFile" accept=".csv" style="display:none;" onchange="updateFileName()">
              <button class="btn" onclick="document.getElementById('csvFile').click()"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder-open"></i> Pilih File CSV</button>
              <p id="fileName" style="margin-top:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--bb4);font-size:13px;"></p>
            </div>
            <button class="btn" style="margin-top:12px;" onclick="loadCSV()"><i class="fa-solid fa-database"></i> Proses &amp; Muat Data</button>
            <div class="csv-example" style="margin-top:18px;">
              <div class="header-row">Nama_Usaha,KBLI,Kecamatan,Status,Jenis_Dokumen,Penanggung_Jawab,Alamat,No_HP,Email,Kewenangan,Tingkat_Risiko</div>
              <div class="data-row">UD Timor Jaya,47111,Kota Soe,Terverifikasi,SPPL,Yohanes Benu,Jl. Diponegoro No.12,08123456789,ud@email.com,Kab/Kota,Rendah</div>
              <div class="data-row">CV TTS Mandiri,38111,Mollo Selatan,Inventarisasi,UKL-UPL,Maria Lopes,Jl. Merdeka 5,08234567890,cv@email.com,Provinsi,Menengah</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="uploadTabManual" class="upload-panel">
            <div class="alert alert-info"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i> Data yang diinput akan langsung tersimpan di penyimpanan lokal browser ini.</div>
            <div class="form-grid">
              <div class="form-group"><label>Nama Usaha / Kegiatan *</label><input id="m_nama" type="text" placeholder="cth: UD Timor Jaya"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Nama Penanggung Jawab *</label><input id="m_pj" type="text" placeholder="cth: Yohanes Benu"></div>
              <div class="form-group full"><label>Alamat Usaha *</label><input id="m_alamat" type="text" placeholder="cth: Jl. Diponegoro No.12, Soe"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Kecamatan *</label>
                <select id="m_kec"><option value="">-- Pilih Kecamatan --</option>
                  <option>Kota Soe</option><option>Mollo Selatan</option><option>Mollo Utara</option><option>Mollo Tengah</option>
                  <option>Amanuban Timur</option><option>Amanuban Barat</option><option>Amanuban Selatan</option>
                  <option>Amanatun Selatan</option><option>Amanatun Utara</option><option>Fatumnasi</option>
                  <option>Polen</option><option>Tobu</option><option>Batu Putih</option><option>Boking</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Kode KBLI *</label><input id="m_kbli" type="text" placeholder="cth: 47111"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>No. HP / Telepon</label><input id="m_hp" type="text" placeholder="cth: 08123456789"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Email</label><input id="m_email" type="email" placeholder="cth: usaha@email.com"></div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Jenis Dokumen Lingkungan *</label>
                <select id="m_dokumen"><option value="">-- Pilih --</option><option>SPPL</option><option>UKL-UPL</option><option>AMDAL</option></select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Kewenangan</label>
                <select id="m_kewenangan"><option value="">-- Pilih --</option><option>Kab/Kota</option><option>Provinsi</option><option>Pusat</option></select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Tingkat Risiko</label>
                <select id="m_risiko"><option value="">-- Pilih --</option><option>Rendah</option><option>Menengah Rendah</option><option>Menengah Tinggi</option><option>Tinggi</option></select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Status</label>
                <select id="m_status"><option>Belum Inventarisasi</option><option>Inventarisasi</option><option>Terverifikasi</option><option>Ketidaksesuaian KBLI</option></select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group"><label>Sumber Data</label>
                <select id="m_sumber"><option>OSS</option><option>Amdalnet</option><option>Input Manual</option></select>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:10px;">
              <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="saveManualData()"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i> Simpan Data</button>
              <button class="btn-outline" onclick="clearManualForm()"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-left"></i> Reset</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== DATA PERSETUJUAN ===== -->
      <div id="page-persetujuan" class="page">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-header-row">
            <span class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-circle-check"></i> Data Persetujuan Lingkungan</span>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
              <button class="btn-export btn-sm" onclick="exportTableToCSV('dataTable','Data_Persetujuan.csv')"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Unduh CSV</button>
              <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="confirmClearAll()"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i> Hapus Semua</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="table-wrap">
            <table id="dataTable">
              <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Nama Usaha</th><th>KBLI</th><th>Dokumen</th><th>Kecamatan</th><th>Kewenangan</th><th>Status</th><th>Aksi</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="dataTableBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== INVENTARISASI ===== -->
      <div id="page-inventarisasi" class="page">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-map-location-dot"></i> Inventarisasi Lapangan</div>
          <div class="ringkasan-grid" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
            <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Target Total</div><div class="ring-value">328</div></div></div>
            <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Selesai / Verifikasi</div><div class="ring-value" style="color:var(--success);" id="inv-done">0</div></div></div>
            <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Dalam Proses</div><div class="ring-value" style="color:var(--warning);" id="inv-proses">0</div></div></div>
            <div class="ring-item"><div><div class="ring-label">Belum Dimulai</div><div class="ring-value" style="color:var(--danger);" id="inv-belum">328</div></div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-list"></i> Status per Usaha</div>
          <div class="table-wrap">
            <table>
              <thead><tr><th>Nama Usaha</th><th>Kecamatan</th><th>Penanggung Jawab</th><th>Status Inventarisasi</th><th>Tgl Verifikasi</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="invTableBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== VERIFIKASI ===== -->
      <div id="page-verifikasi" class="page">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-check-double"></i> Verifikasi Lapangan — Input Hasil Kunjungan</div>
          <div class="alert alert-warning"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></i> SPPL terbit otomatis di Amdalnet saat pendaftaran OSS-RBA. Verifikasi mandiri DLH diperlukan untuk memastikan pemenuhan persyaratan izin lingkungan di lapangan.</div>
          <div id="verifAlert" class="alert alert-success" style="display:none;"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> <span id="verifAlertMsg"></span></div>

          <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:0;">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Pilih Usaha yang Diverifikasi *</label>
              <select id="verifUsaha"><option value="">-- Pilih NIB / Nama Usaha --</option></select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Nama Petugas DLH *</label>
              <input type="text" id="verifPetugas" placeholder="Nama lengkap petugas verifikasi">
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Tanggal Verifikasi</label>
              <input type="date" id="verifTanggal">
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Usaha Aktif di Lapangan?</label>
              <select id="verifAktif">
                <option value="">-- Pilih --</option>
                <option>Ya, aktif beroperasi</option>
                <option>Ya, tapi tidak aktif</option>
                <option>Tidak ditemukan</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Kesesuaian KBLI</label>
              <select id="verifKBLI">
                <option value="">-- Pilih --</option>
                <option>Sesuai</option>
                <option>Tidak Sesuai</option>
                <option>Perlu Kajian Lebih Lanjut</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Dokumen Lingkungan Tersedia?</label>
              <select id="verifDokumen">
                <option value="">-- Pilih --</option>
                <option>Ada dan Sesuai</option>
                <option>Ada tapi Tidak Sesuai</option>
                <option>Tidak Ada</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Hasil Verifikasi *</label>
              <select id="verifHasil">
                <option value="">-- Pilih --</option>
                <option>Memenuhi Syarat</option>
                <option>Belum Memenuhi Syarat</option>
                <option>Perlu Tindak Lanjut</option>
                <option>Ketidaksesuaian KBLI</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group full">
              <label>Catatan Hasil Verifikasi Lapangan</label>
              <textarea id="verifCatatan" placeholder="Tuliskan temuan, kondisi lapangan, dan rekomendasi tindak lanjut..."></textarea>
            </div>
            <!-- FOTO SECTION -->
            <div class="foto-section">
              <div class="foto-section-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-camera"></i> Dokumentasi Foto Lapangan</div>
              <div class="foto-actions">
                <button class="foto-btn primary-foto" onclick="openCamera()"><i class="fa-solid fa-camera"></i> Ambil Foto (Kamera)</button>
                <button class="foto-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('fotoFileInput').click()"><i class="fa-solid fa-images"></i> Pilih dari Galeri</button>
                <input type="file" id="fotoFileInput" accept="image/*" multiple style="display:none;" onchange="handleFotoFile(event)">
                <span id="fotoCount" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);align-self:center;margin-left:4px;"></span>
              </div>
              <div class="camera-preview-wrap" id="cameraPreviewWrap">
                <video id="cameraVideo" autoplay playsinline muted></video>
                <canvas id="cameraCanvas" style="display:none;"></canvas>
                <div class="camera-controls">
                  <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="capturePhoto()"><i class="fa-solid fa-camera"></i> Ambil Foto</button>
                  <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="closeCamera()"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i> Tutup Kamera</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div id="fotoGrid" class="foto-grid"></div>
              <div style="margin-top:7px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info" style="color:var(--bb3);"></i> Foto dikompresi otomatis dan tersimpan bersama data verifikasi. Klik foto untuk memperbesar.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:18px;">
            <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="saveVerifikasi()"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i> Simpan Hasil Verifikasi</button>
            <button class="btn-outline" onclick="clearVerifForm()"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-left"></i> Reset Form</button>
          </div>

          <!-- RIWAYAT -->
          <div style="margin-top:24px;">
            <div class="panel-header-row" style="padding-top:16px;border-top:2px solid var(--bb-bg);">
              <span class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left"></i> Riwayat Hasil Verifikasi</span>
              <button class="btn-export btn-sm" onclick="exportVerifCSV()"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Unduh CSV</button>
            </div>
            <div class="table-wrap">
              <table id="verifTable">
                <thead><tr><th>Nama Usaha</th><th>Petugas</th><th>Tanggal</th><th>Hasil</th><th>Kesesuaian KBLI</th><th>Foto</th><th>Catatan</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody id="verifTableBody"></tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== KBLI ===== -->
      <div id="page-kbli" class="page">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-header-row">
            <span class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></i> Temuan Potensi Ketidaksesuaian KBLI</span>
            <button class="btn-export btn-sm" onclick="exportTableToCSV('kbliTable','Temuan_KBLI.csv')"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Unduh CSV</button>
          </div>
          <div class="table-wrap">
            <table id="kbliTable">
              <thead><tr><th>Nama Usaha</th><th>KBLI Terdaftar</th><th>KBLI Seharusnya</th><th>Kecamatan</th><th>Keterangan</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="kbliBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== LAPORAN ===== -->
      <div id="page-laporan" class="page">
        <div class="panel" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
          <div class="panel-header-row">
            <span class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-column"></i> Sebaran Usaha per Kecamatan</span>
            <button class="btn-export btn-sm" onclick="exportTableToCSV('laporanSummaryTable','Laporan_Ringkasan.csv')"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Unduh</button>
          </div>
          <canvas id="laporanChart" style="max-height:280px;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="dash-grid">
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-pie"></i> Distribusi Jenis Dokumen Lingkungan</div>
            <canvas id="jenisChart" style="max-height:240px;"></canvas>
          </div>
          <div class="panel">
            <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-list-check"></i> Ringkasan Laporan</div>
            <table id="laporanSummaryTable">
              <tbody>
                <tr><td>Total Persetujuan</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;" id="ls-total">328</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Terverifikasi</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:var(--success);" id="ls-ver">0</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Terinventarisasi</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:var(--warning);" id="ls-inv">0</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Potensi Ketidaksesuaian KBLI</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);" id="ls-kbli">0</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Belum Inventarisasi</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);" id="ls-belum">328</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== ROADMAP ===== -->
      <div id="page-roadmap" class="page">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-road"></i> Roadmap Pengembangan VERITAS</div>
          <ul style="list-style:none;">
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">Dashboard Eksekutif &amp; Statistik</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">Upload CSV Data OSS &amp; Amdalnet</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">Input Manual Data Persetujuan</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">Form Verifikasi Lapangan Lengkap</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">📷 Foto Lapangan — Kamera Langsung &amp; Galeri</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">💾 Penyimpanan Lokal Penuh — Tanpa Server/Google Sheet</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">3 Level Akses Pengguna: Pimpinan, Admin, Petugas</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">Ekspor Data ke CSV</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-done"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></div><div class="rm-label done">Temuan &amp; Laporan Ketidaksesuaian KBLI</div><span class="rm-tag tag-done">Selesai</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-todo"></div><div class="rm-label todo">Integrasi Database Server (PostgreSQL)</div><span class="rm-tag tag-active">Berikutnya</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-todo"></div><div class="rm-label todo">Integrasi GIS &amp; Peta Sebaran Interaktif Penuh</div><span class="rm-tag tag-todo">Direncanakan</span></li>
            <li class="roadmap-item"><div class="rm-check rm-todo"></div><div class="rm-label todo">Integrasi API OSS-RBA &amp; Amdalnet Langsung</div><span class="rm-tag tag-todo">Direncanakan</span></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== TENTANG & SOP ===== -->
      <div id="page-tentang" class="page">
        <div class="panel" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i> Tentang Sistem VERITAS</div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <div style="flex:1;min-width:260px;">
              <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:8px;">Deskripsi</div>
              <p style="font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.75;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:14px;"><strong>VERITAS</strong> (Verifikasi dan Inventarisasi Data Persetujuan Lingkungan) adalah sistem informasi manajemen berbasis web yang dikembangkan oleh DLH Kabupaten Timor Tengah Selatan untuk mendukung pengawasan, inventarisasi, dan verifikasi persetujuan lingkungan hidup.</p>
              <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:8px;">Tujuan</div>
              <ul class="tujuan-list">
                <li><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Konsolidasi data OSS &amp; Amdalnet</li>
                <li><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Inventarisasi lapangan usaha/kegiatan</li>
                <li><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Verifikasi dokumen lingkungan + foto</li>
                <li><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Deteksi ketidaksesuaian KBLI</li>
                <li><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Penyimpanan mandiri tanpa server eksternal</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
            <div style="flex:1;min-width:260px;">
              <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:8px;">Hak Akses per Peran</div>
              <table style="font-size:12px;">
                <thead><tr><th>Fitur</th><th>Pimpinan</th><th>Admin</th><th>Petugas</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Dashboard</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Upload Data</td><td>—</td><td>✅</td><td>—</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Data Persetujuan</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Inventarisasi</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Verifikasi + Foto</td><td>—</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Temuan KBLI</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td><td>—</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Laporan</td><td>✅</td><td>✅</td><td>—</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Pengaturan</td><td>—</td><td>✅</td><td>—</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-header-row">
            <span class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-contract"></i> SOP Verifikasi Lapangan DLH</span>
            <button class="btn-export btn-sm" onclick="downloadSOP()"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Unduh SOP</button>
          </div>
          <div class="sop-step"><div class="sop-num">1</div><div class="sop-content"><h4>Persiapan Administrasi</h4><p>Petugas DLH menyiapkan daftar usaha/kegiatan dari data OSS/Amdalnet, membawa surat tugas resmi dari Kepala Dinas, dan menyiapkan formulir verifikasi.</p></div></div>
          <div class="sop-step"><div class="sop-num">2</div><div class="sop-content"><h4>Koordinasi dengan Pemilik Usaha</h4><p>Petugas menghubungi penanggung jawab usaha untuk menjadwalkan kunjungan dan menginformasikan dokumen yang harus disiapkan (SPPL, UKL-UPL, atau AMDAL).</p></div></div>
          <div class="sop-step"><div class="sop-num">3</div><div class="sop-content"><h4>Kunjungan, Observasi &amp; Dokumentasi Foto</h4><p>Petugas mengunjungi lokasi, memverifikasi aktivitas usaha, dan mengambil foto lapangan langsung dari menu Verifikasi VERITAS menggunakan kamera HP atau upload dari galeri.</p></div></div>
          <div class="sop-step"><div class="sop-num">4</div><div class="sop-content"><h4>Pemeriksaan Dokumen Lingkungan</h4><p>Petugas memeriksa ketersediaan dan kesesuaian dokumen SPPL/UKL-UPL/AMDAL, serta memverifikasi kode KBLI yang terdaftar dengan kegiatan aktual di lapangan.</p></div></div>
          <div class="sop-step"><div class="sop-num">5</div><div class="sop-content"><h4>Input Hasil Verifikasi ke VERITAS</h4><p>Petugas segera menginput hasil verifikasi, mengisi status kepatuhan, kesesuaian KBLI, catatan temuan, dan melampirkan foto dokumentasi lapangan. Data tersimpan otomatis.</p></div></div>
          <div class="sop-step"><div class="sop-num">6</div><div class="sop-content"><h4>Pelaporan dan Tindak Lanjut</h4><p>Hasil verifikasi dilaporkan kepada Kepala Bidang. Apabila ditemukan ketidaksesuaian KBLI atau pelanggaran, data diteruskan ke Tim Pengawasan untuk tindak lanjut administratif.</p></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ===== PENGATURAN ===== -->
      <div id="page-pengaturan" class="page">
        <div class="panel">
          <div class="panel-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-gear"></i> Pengaturan &amp; Manajemen Data</div>
          <div class="alert alert-info" style="margin-bottom:18px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i> Semua data VERITAS tersimpan di localStorage browser ini. Gunakan dengan hati-hati saat menghapus data karena tidak dapat dipulihkan.</div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;max-width:500px;">
            <div style="background:var(--bb-bg);border:1px solid var(--bb-border);border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:16px;">
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--bb5);margin-bottom:4px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-download" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>Ekspor Semua Data</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;">Unduh data inventarisasi dan verifikasi ke file CSV.</div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="exportTableToCSV('dataTable','Data_Persetujuan.csv')"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-csv"></i> Data Persetujuan</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="exportVerifCSV()"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-csv"></i> Data Verifikasi</button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style="background:var(--warning-bg);border:1px solid #FFD591;border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:16px;">
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#924010;margin-bottom:4px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-rotate-left" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>Reset Data Verifikasi</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:#924010;margin-bottom:10px;">Hapus semua riwayat verifikasi. Data persetujuan tetap ada.</div>
              <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#D97706,#FF9F43);" onclick="resetVerifikasi()"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i> Reset Verifikasi</button>
            </div>
            <div style="background:var(--danger-bg);border:1px solid #F5C2C2;border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:16px;">
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#C93A3A;margin-bottom:4px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash-can" style="margin-right:5px;"></i>Reset Seluruh Data</div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:#C93A3A;margin-bottom:10px;">⚠️ Menghapus SEMUA data termasuk persetujuan, verifikasi, dan foto. Tidak dapat dibatalkan!</div>
              <button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="confirmClearAll()"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash-can"></i> Hapus Semua Data</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /content -->
  </div><!-- /main -->
</div><!-- /wrapper -->

<!-- DETAIL MODAL -->

  <div class="modal-box">

</div>

<!-- FOTO VIEWER -->
