<!-- ====== JAVASCRIPT ====== -->
<script>
'use strict';

// ========== DATA SAMPLE ==========
const SAMPLE_DATA = [
  { nama:'UD Timor Jaya', pj:'Yohanes Benu', alamat:'Jl. Diponegoro No.12, Soe', kec:'Kota Soe', hp:'08123456789', email:'ud.timorjaya@email.com', kbli:'47111', dokumen:'SPPL', kewenangan:'Kab/Kota', risiko:'Rendah', sumber:'OSS', status:'Terverifikasi', tglVerif:'' },
  { nama:'CV TTS Mandiri', pj:'Maria Lopes', alamat:'Jl. Merdeka No.5', kec:'Mollo Selatan', hp:'08234567890', email:'cv.ttsmandiri@email.com', kbli:'38111', dokumen:'UKL-UPL', kewenangan:'Provinsi', risiko:'Menengah', sumber:'Amdalnet', status:'Inventarisasi', tglVerif:'' },
  { nama:'PT Hijau Lestari', pj:'Petrus Taneo', alamat:'Jl. Kehutanan No.3', kec:'Amanuban Timur', hp:'08345678901', email:'hijaulestari@email.com', kbli:'01111', dokumen:'AMDAL', kewenangan:'Pusat', risiko:'Tinggi', sumber:'Amdalnet', status:'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI', tglVerif:'' },
  { nama:'UD Soe Makmur', pj:'Siti Fallo', alamat:'Jl. Sudirman No.8', kec:'Kota Soe', hp:'08456789012', email:'soemakmur@email.com', kbli:'56101', dokumen:'SPPL', kewenangan:'Kab/Kota', risiko:'Rendah', sumber:'OSS', status:'Belum Inventarisasi', tglVerif:'' },
  { nama:'CV Nusa Flobamor', pj:'Andreas Lafu', alamat:'Jl. Fatumnasi No.1', kec:'Fatumnasi', hp:'08567890123', email:'nusaflobamor@email.com', kbli:'38211', dokumen:'UKL-UPL', kewenangan:'Provinsi', risiko:'Menengah', sumber:'OSS', status:'Inventarisasi', tglVerif:'' },
];
const SAMPLE_KBLI = [
  { nama:'PT Hijau Lestari', kbliLama:'01111', kbliBaru:'02111', kec:'Amanuban Timur', ket:'Usaha kehutanan, bukan pertanian' },
  { nama:'UD Mitra Usaha', kbliLama:'47191', kbliBaru:'56101', kec:'Kota Soe', ket:'Beroperasi sebagai restoran' },
  { nama:'CV Soe Indah', kbliLama:'68100', kbliBaru:'41011', kec:'Mollo Utara', ket:'Properti digunakan untuk konstruksi' },
];

// ========== ROLES ==========
const ROLES = {
  pimpinan:{ label:'Pimpinan / Kepala Dinas', pass:'dlh2025', icon:'fa-crown',
    menus:['dashboard','persetujuan','inventarisasi','kbli','laporan','roadmap','tentang'] },
  admin:{ label:'Administrator', pass:'veritas123', icon:'fa-user-shield',
    menus:['dashboard','upload','persetujuan','inventarisasi','verifikasi','kbli','laporan','roadmap','tentang','pengaturan'] },
  petugas:{ label:'Petugas DLH', pass:'petugas123', icon:'fa-user-tie',
    menus:['dashboard','persetujuan','inventarisasi','verifikasi','tentang'] },
};
const MENU_DEF = [
  { id:'dashboard',     label:'Dashboard',           icon:'fa-house',               grp:'Menu Utama' },
  { id:'upload',        label:'Upload Data',          icon:'fa-upload',              grp:'Menu Utama' },
  { id:'persetujuan',   label:'Data Persetujuan',     icon:'fa-file-circle-check',   grp:'Menu Utama' },
  { id:'inventarisasi', label:'Inventarisasi',        icon:'fa-map-location-dot',    grp:'Lapangan' },
  { id:'verifikasi',    label:'Verifikasi + Foto',    icon:'fa-camera',              grp:'Lapangan' },
  { id:'kbli',          label:'Temuan KBLI',          icon:'fa-triangle-exclamation',grp:'Analisis', badge:true },
  { id:'laporan',       label:'Laporan Statistik',    icon:'fa-chart-column',        grp:'Analisis' },
  { id:'roadmap',       label:'Roadmap',              icon:'fa-road',                grp:'Sistem' },
  { id:'tentang',       label:'Tentang & SOP',        icon:'fa-circle-info',         grp:'Sistem' },
  { id:'pengaturan',    label:'Pengaturan',            icon:'fa-gear',                grp:'Sistem' },
];
const PAGE_TITLES = {
  dashboard:'Dashboard Eksekutif', upload:'Upload Data', persetujuan:'Data Persetujuan',
  inventarisasi:'Inventarisasi Lapangan', verifikasi:'Verifikasi Lapangan',
  kbli:'Temuan Ketidaksesuaian KBLI', laporan:'Laporan Statistik', roadmap:'Roadmap Pengembangan',
  tentang:'Tentang & SOP VERITAS', pengaturan:'Pengaturan Sistem'
};

let currentRole = 'pimpinan';
let selectedRole = 'pimpinan';
let fotos = [];
let fotoViewerList = [];
let fotoViewerIdx = 0;

// ========== FIX: STORAGE HELPERS ==========
function lsGet(key, def) {
  try { const v = localStorage.getItem(key); return v ? JSON.parse(v) : def; } catch(e) { return def; }
}
function lsSet(key, val) {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(val));
    updateSyncPill('ok');
    updateStorageInfo();
  } catch(e) {
    if(e.name === 'QuotaExceededError') {
      alert('⚠️ Penyimpanan lokal penuh!\n\nSilakan hapus beberapa foto lama melalui menu Pengaturan → Reset Data Verifikasi, lalu coba lagi.');
    }
  }
}
function getPersetujuan() { return lsGet('veritas_persetujuan', SAMPLE_DATA.map(d => ({...d}))); }
function setPersetujuan(d) { lsSet('veritas_persetujuan', d); }
function getVerifikasi() { return lsGet('veritas_verifikasi', []); }
function setVerifikasi(d) { lsSet('veritas_verifikasi', d); }

// ========== FIX: STORAGE INFO (NaN fix) ==========
function updateStorageInfo() {
  try {
    let bytes = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
      const key = localStorage.key(i);
      const val = localStorage.getItem(key) || '';
      bytes += (key.length + val.length) * 2; // UTF-16
    }
    const kb = Math.round(bytes / 1024);
    const pct = Math.min(100, Math.round(kb / 5120 * 100));
    const el = document.getElementById('storageUsed');
    if (el) el.textContent = kb + ' KB digunakan';
    const bar = document.getElementById('storageBar');
    if (bar) bar.style.width = Math.max(1, pct) + '%';
  } catch(e) {
    const el = document.getElementById('storageUsed');
    if (el) el.textContent = 'Tidak dapat dihitung';
  }
}
function updateSyncPill(state) {
  const el = document.getElementById('syncPill');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Tersimpan';
  el.style.color = 'var(--bb4)';
}

// ========== DATE ==========
document.getElementById('todayDate').textContent =
  new Date().toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { weekday:'short', year:'numeric', month:'short', day:'numeric' });

// ========== LOGIN ==========
function selectRole(role, el) {
  selectedRole = role;
  document.querySelectorAll('.role-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
  el.classList.add('selected');
}
function doLogin() {
  const u = document.getElementById('username').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const p = document.getElementById('password').value;
  const r = ROLES[selectedRole];
  const err = document.getElementById('loginError');
  if (u === selectedRole && p === r.pass) {
    err.style.display = 'none';
    currentRole = selectedRole;
    document.getElementById('loginPage').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('mainApp').style.display = 'flex';
    initSession();
  } else {
    err.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('password').value = '';
    document.getElementById('password').focus();
  }
}
function doLogout() {
  if (!confirm('Yakin ingin keluar dari VERITAS?')) return;
  stopCamera();
  fotos = [];
  // Reset chart states
  chartsInited = false; mapInited = false; laporanChartsInited = false;
  if (statusChartInst) { statusChartInst.destroy(); statusChartInst = null; }
  if (laporanChartInst) { laporanChartInst.destroy(); laporanChartInst = null; }
  if (jenisChartInst) { jenisChartInst.destroy(); jenisChartInst = null; }
  document.getElementById('mainApp').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('loginPage').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('username').value = '';
  document.getElementById('password').value = '';
}

// ========== SESSION INIT ==========
let chartsInited = false, mapInited = false, laporanChartsInited = false;
let statusChartInst = null, laporanChartInst = null, jenisChartInst = null;

function initSession() {
  setupRole();
  document.getElementById('verifTanggal').value = todayISO();
  renderDataTable();
  renderVerifTable();
  renderKbliTable();
  refreshFotoGrid();
  refreshDashboard();
  initStatusChart();
  initMap();
  updateStorageInfo();
}

function setupRole() {
  const r = ROLES[currentRole];
  document.getElementById('userDisplayName').textContent = r.label;
  document.getElementById('userRoleDisplay').textContent = 'DLH Kabupaten TTS';
  document.getElementById('sidebarName').textContent = r.label;
  document.getElementById('userAvatar').innerHTML = `<i class="fa-solid ${r.icon}"></i>`;
  document.getElementById('suAv').innerHTML = `<i class="fa-solid ${r.icon}"></i>`;
  const menu = document.getElementById('sidebarMenu');
  let html = '', lastGrp = '';
  MENU_DEF.forEach(m => {
    if (!r.menus.includes(m.id)) return;
    if (m.grp && m.grp !== lastGrp) { html += `<div class="menu-label">${m.grp}</div>`; lastGrp = m.grp; }
    const bdg = m.badge ? `<span class="badge-dot" id="kbliDot">0</span>` : '';
    const act = m.id === 'dashboard' ? ' active' : '';
    html += `<div class="menu-item${act}" onclick="showPage('${m.id}',this)"><i class="fa-solid ${m.icon}"></i><span>${m.label}</span>${bdg}</div>`;
  });
  menu.innerHTML = html;
}

// ========== PAGE NAV ==========
function showPage(id, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  const pg = document.getElementById('page-' + id);
  if (pg) pg.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.menu-item').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('active'));
  if (el) el.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('pageTitle').textContent = PAGE_TITLES[id] || id;
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
  if (id === 'verifikasi') { populateVerifSelect(); }
  if (id === 'inventarisasi') renderInvTable();
  if (id === 'laporan') initLaporanCharts();
  if (id === 'dashboard') refreshDashboard();
  if (id === 'kbli') renderKbliTable();
  updateStorageInfo();
}

// ========== HELPERS ==========
function todayISO() { return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10); }
function badgeClass(s) {
  if (s === 'Terverifikasi') return 'badge-success';
  if (s === 'Inventarisasi') return 'badge-warning';
  if (s === 'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI') return 'badge-danger';
  return 'badge-info';
}
function esc(str) { return String(str || '').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }

// ========== DASHBOARD ==========
function refreshDashboard() {
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  const inv = data.filter(d => d.status === 'Inventarisasi' || d.status === 'Terverifikasi').length;
  const ver = data.filter(d => d.status === 'Terverifikasi').length;
  const kbli = data.filter(d => d.status === 'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI').length;
  const total = Math.max(328, data.length);
  animateCounter('totalUsaha', total);
  animateCounter('totalInventarisasi', inv);
  animateCounter('totalVerifikasi', ver);
  animateCounter('totalKBLI', kbli);
  const ri = document.getElementById('r-inv'); if (ri) ri.textContent = inv;
  const rb = document.getElementById('r-belum'); if (rb) rb.textContent = Math.max(0, total - inv);
  // Prioritas table
  const pb = document.getElementById('prioritasBody');
  if (pb) {
    pb.innerHTML = data.slice(0, 8).map((d, i) =>
      `<tr class="clickable-row" onclick="openDetailModal(${i})"><td>${esc(d.nama)}</td><td>${esc(d.kbli)}</td><td>${esc(d.kec)}</td><td><span class="badge ${badgeClass(d.status)}">${esc(d.status)}</span></td></tr>`
    ).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="4" style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:20px;">Belum ada data.</td></tr>';
  }
  const dot = document.getElementById('kbliDot'); if (dot) dot.textContent = kbli;
  // Laporan summary
  const lt = document.getElementById('ls-total'); if (lt) lt.textContent = total;
  const lv = document.getElementById('ls-ver'); if (lv) lv.textContent = ver;
  const li = document.getElementById('ls-inv'); if (li) li.textContent = inv;
  const lk = document.getElementById('ls-kbli'); if (lk) lk.textContent = kbli;
  const lb = document.getElementById('ls-belum'); if (lb) lb.textContent = Math.max(0, total - inv);
}

function animateCounter(id, target) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id); if (!el) return;
  let v = 0; const inc = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(target / 40));
  const t = setInterval(() => { v = Math.min(v + inc, target); el.textContent = v; if (v >= target) clearInterval(t); }, 18);
}

// ========== FIX: CHARTS — destroy before re-create ==========
function initStatusChart() {
  if (chartsInited) return; chartsInited = true;
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  const counts = [
    data.filter(d => d.status === 'Terverifikasi').length,
    data.filter(d => d.status === 'Inventarisasi').length,
    data.filter(d => d.status === 'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI').length,
    data.filter(d => d.status === 'Belum Inventarisasi').length,
  ];
  const ctx = document.getElementById('statusChart'); if (!ctx) return;
  if (statusChartInst) { statusChartInst.destroy(); }
  statusChartInst = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'doughnut',
    data: { labels: ['Terverifikasi','Inventarisasi','Ketidaksesuaian KBLI','Belum Inventarisasi'],
      datasets: [{ data: counts, backgroundColor: ['#28C76F','#FF9F43','#EA5455','#8FD9FB'], borderWidth: 0 }] },
    options: { responsive: true, plugins: { legend: { position:'bottom', labels:{ font:{ size:11 }, padding:10 } } }, cutout:'55%' }
  });
}

function initLaporanCharts() {
  if (laporanChartsInited) return; laporanChartsInited = true;
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  const kecMap = {};
  data.forEach(d => { if (d.kec) kecMap[d.kec] = (kecMap[d.kec] || 0) + 1; });
  const kl = Object.keys(kecMap), kv = kl.map(k => kecMap[k]);
  const lc = document.getElementById('laporanChart');
  if (lc) {
    if (laporanChartInst) laporanChartInst.destroy();
    laporanChartInst = new Chart(lc, {
      type: 'bar',
      data: { labels: kl.length ? kl : ['Belum ada data'], datasets: [{ label:'Jumlah', data: kv.length ? kv : [0], backgroundColor:'#8FD9FB', borderRadius:6 }] },
      options: { responsive:true, plugins:{ legend:{ display:false } }, scales:{ y:{ beginAtZero:true, ticks:{ color:'#7A93A8' } }, x:{ ticks:{ color:'#7A93A8', maxRotation:45 } } } }
    });
  }
  const spplC = ['SPPL','UKL-UPL','AMDAL'].map(dok => data.filter(x => x.dokumen === dok).length);
  const jc = document.getElementById('jenisChart');
  if (jc) {
    if (jenisChartInst) jenisChartInst.destroy();
    jenisChartInst = new Chart(jc, {
      type: 'pie',
      data: { labels: ['SPPL','UKL-UPL','AMDAL'], datasets: [{ data: spplC, backgroundColor: ['#8FD9FB','#FF9F43','#28C76F'], borderWidth:0 }] },
      options: { responsive:true, plugins:{ legend:{ position:'bottom', labels:{ font:{ size:11 } } } } }
    });
  }
}

// ========== MAP ==========
function initMap() {
  if (mapInited) return; mapInited = true;
  setTimeout(() => {
    try {
      const map = L.map('leafletMap').setView([-9.85, 124.35], 10);
      L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', { attribution:'© OpenStreetMap' }).addTo(map);
      const colorMap = { 'Terverifikasi':'#28C76F','Inventarisasi':'#FF9F43','Ketidaksesuaian KBLI':'#EA5455','Belum Inventarisasi':'#8FD9FB' };
      const baseCoords = { 'Kota Soe':[-9.86,124.29],'Mollo Selatan':[-9.91,124.42],'Amanuban Timur':[-9.77,124.38],'Fatumnasi':[-9.95,124.45],'Mollo Utara':[-9.88,124.35] };
      const data = getPersetujuan();
      data.slice(0, 15).forEach((d, i) => {
        const base = baseCoords[d.kec] || [-9.85 + (i % 5) * 0.05, 124.35 + (i % 4) * 0.04];
        const lat = base[0] + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.025;
        const lng = base[1] + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.025;
        const c = colorMap[d.status] || '#8FD9FB';
        const ic = L.divIcon({ className:'', html:`<div style="width:14px;height:14px;background:${c};border-radius:50%;border:2.5px solid white;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.35);"></div>` });
        L.marker([lat, lng], { icon: ic }).addTo(map)
          .bindPopup(`<strong>${d.nama}</strong><br><small>${d.kec}</small><br><span style="color:${c};font-weight:600;">${d.status}</span>`);
      });
      // Legend
      const legend = L.control({ position:'bottomright' });
      legend.onAdd = () => {
        const div = L.DomUtil.create('div');
        div.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.8;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.15);';
        div.innerHTML = '<strong style="display:block;margin-bottom:4px;color:#135E84;">Status</strong>' +
          ['Terverifikasi:#28C76F','Inventarisasi:#FF9F43','Ketidaksesuaian KBLI:#EA5455','Belum Inventarisasi:#8FD9FB']
          .map(s => { const [l,c] = s.split(':'); return `<div><span style="display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;background:${c};border-radius:50%;margin-right:5px;vertical-align:middle;"></span>${l}</div>`; }).join('');
        return div;
      };
      legend.addTo(map);
    } catch(e) { console.error('Map error:', e); }
  }, 300);
}

// ========== UPLOAD ==========
function switchUploadTab(tab, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.upload-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.upload-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  el.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('uploadTab' + tab.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + tab.slice(1)).classList.add('active');
}
function updateFileName() { const f = document.getElementById('csvFile').files[0]; if (f) document.getElementById('fileName').textContent = '✓ ' + f.name; }
function loadCSV() {
  const file = document.getElementById('csvFile').files[0];
  if (!file) { alert('Pilih file CSV terlebih dahulu'); return; }
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = e => {
    const rows = e.target.result.split('\n').slice(1);
    const data = getPersetujuan();
    let total = 0;
    rows.forEach(row => {
      const cols = row.split(',').map(c => c.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ''));
      if (cols.length >= 3 && cols[0]) {
        total++;
        data.push({ nama:cols[0], kbli:cols[1]||'—', kec:cols[2]||'—', status:cols[3]||'Belum Inventarisasi',
          dokumen:cols[4]||'—', pj:cols[5]||'—', alamat:cols[6]||'—', hp:cols[7]||'—',
          email:cols[8]||'—', kewenangan:cols[9]||'—', risiko:cols[10]||'—', sumber:'CSV Upload', tglVerif:'' });
      }
    });
    setPersetujuan(data);
    renderDataTable();
    alert(total + ' data berhasil dimuat dari CSV.');
    showPage('persetujuan', null);
  };
  reader.readAsText(file);
}
function saveManualData() {
  const nama = document.getElementById('m_nama').value.trim();
  const kec = document.getElementById('m_kec').value;
  if (!nama || !kec) { alert('Nama usaha dan kecamatan wajib diisi'); return; }
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  data.push({ nama, pj:document.getElementById('m_pj').value||'—', alamat:document.getElementById('m_alamat').value||'—', kec,
    hp:document.getElementById('m_hp').value||'—', email:document.getElementById('m_email').value||'—',
    kbli:document.getElementById('m_kbli').value||'—', dokumen:document.getElementById('m_dokumen').value||'—',
    kewenangan:document.getElementById('m_kewenangan').value||'—', risiko:document.getElementById('m_risiko').value||'—',
    status:document.getElementById('m_status').value, sumber:document.getElementById('m_sumber').value, tglVerif:'' });
  setPersetujuan(data);
  clearManualForm();
  renderDataTable();
  alert('✓ Data berhasil disimpan!');
  showPage('persetujuan', null);
}
function clearManualForm() {
  ['m_nama','m_pj','m_alamat','m_hp','m_email','m_kbli'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = ''; });
  ['m_kec','m_dokumen','m_kewenangan','m_risiko'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = ''; });
  document.getElementById('m_status').value = 'Belum Inventarisasi';
  document.getElementById('m_sumber').value = 'OSS';
}

// ========== TABLE RENDER ==========
function renderDataTable() {
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  const tbody = document.getElementById('dataTableBody'); if (!tbody) return;
  tbody.innerHTML = data.length ? data.map((d, i) => `
    <tr class="clickable-row" onclick="openDetailModal(${i})">
      <td style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11.5px;">${i + 1}</td>
      <td style="font-weight:600;">${esc(d.nama)}</td>
      <td><span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;">${esc(d.kbli)}</span></td>
      <td>${esc(d.dokumen || '—')}</td><td>${esc(d.kec)}</td><td>${esc(d.kewenangan || '—')}</td>
      <td><span class="badge ${badgeClass(d.status)}">${esc(d.status)}</span></td>
      <td><button class="btn btn-sm" style="padding:5px 9px;font-size:11px;" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openDetailModal(${i})"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i></button></td>
    </tr>`).join('') :
    '<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:24px;">Belum ada data. Input melalui menu Upload Data.</td></tr>';
  refreshDashboard();
}

function renderInvTable() {
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  const tbody = document.getElementById('invTableBody'); if (!tbody) return;
  const done = data.filter(d => d.status === 'Terverifikasi').length;
  const proses = data.filter(d => d.status === 'Inventarisasi').length;
  const belum = data.filter(d => d.status === 'Belum Inventarisasi').length;
  const di = document.getElementById('inv-done'); if (di) di.textContent = done + proses;
  const dp = document.getElementById('inv-proses'); if (dp) dp.textContent = proses;
  const db = document.getElementById('inv-belum'); if (db) db.textContent = belum;
  tbody.innerHTML = data.map(d => {
    let badge = 'badge-info', label = 'Belum Dimulai';
    if (d.status === 'Terverifikasi') { badge = 'badge-success'; label = 'Selesai'; }
    else if (d.status === 'Inventarisasi') { badge = 'badge-warning'; label = 'Dalam Proses'; }
    else if (d.status === 'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI') { badge = 'badge-danger'; label = 'Perlu Kajian'; }
    return `<tr><td>${esc(d.nama)}</td><td>${esc(d.kec)}</td><td>${esc(d.pj || '—')}</td><td><span class="badge ${badge}">${label}</span></td><td>${esc(d.tglVerif || '—')}</td></tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

function renderKbliTable() {
  const kbliData = lsGet('veritas_kbli', SAMPLE_KBLI);
  const tbody = document.getElementById('kbliBody'); if (!tbody) return;
  tbody.innerHTML = kbliData.map(k => `<tr>
    <td>${esc(k.nama)}</td>
    <td><span class="badge badge-danger">${esc(k.kbliLama)}</span></td>
    <td><span class="badge badge-success">${esc(k.kbliBaru)}</span></td>
    <td>${esc(k.kec)}</td><td>${esc(k.ket)}</td>
  </tr>`).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:20px;">Belum ada temuan.</td></tr>';
}

// ========== DETAIL MODAL ==========
function openDetailModal(idx) {
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  const d = data[idx]; if (!d) return;
  document.getElementById('modalNama').textContent = d.nama;
  document.getElementById('modalSub').textContent = d.kec + ' — KBLI ' + d.kbli;
  ['nama','pj','alamat','kec','hp','email','kbli','dokumen','kewenangan','risiko','sumber'].forEach(k => {
    const el = document.getElementById('d_' + k); if (el) el.textContent = d[k] || '—';
  });
  document.getElementById('d_status').innerHTML = `<span class="badge ${badgeClass(d.status)}">${esc(d.status)}</span>`;
  document.getElementById('detailModal').classList.add('open');
}
function closeDetailModal() { document.getElementById('detailModal').classList.remove('open'); }

// ========== VERIFIKASI ==========
function populateVerifSelect() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('verifUsaha'); if (!sel) return;
  const data = getPersetujuan();
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Pilih NIB / Nama Usaha --</option>' +
    data.map((d, i) => `<option value="${i}">${esc(d.nama)} — ${esc(d.kec)}</option>`).join('');
}

function saveVerifikasi() {
  const idxVal = document.getElementById('verifUsaha').value;
  const petugas = document.getElementById('verifPetugas').value.trim();
  const hasil = document.getElementById('verifHasil').value;
  if (!idxVal) { alert('Pilih usaha yang akan diverifikasi'); return; }
  if (!petugas) { alert('Nama petugas wajib diisi'); return; }
  if (!hasil) { alert('Hasil verifikasi wajib dipilih'); return; }

  const data = getPersetujuan();
  const usaha = data[parseInt(idxVal)];
  const tgl = document.getElementById('verifTanggal').value || todayISO();

  if (hasil === 'Memenuhi Syarat') usaha.status = 'Terverifikasi';
  else if (hasil === 'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI') usaha.status = 'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI';
  else usaha.status = 'Inventarisasi';
  usaha.tglVerif = tgl;
  setPersetujuan(data);

  const verifs = getVerifikasi();
  verifs.unshift({
    id: Date.now(), nama: usaha.nama, kec: usaha.kec, kbli: usaha.kbli,
    petugas, tgl,
    aktif: document.getElementById('verifAktif').value || '—',
    kbliMatch: document.getElementById('verifKBLI').value || '—',
    dokumen: document.getElementById('verifDokumen').value || '—',
    hasil,
    catatan: document.getElementById('verifCatatan').value || '',
    fotos: fotos.map(f => ({ dataUrl: f.dataUrl, name: f.name, time: f.time }))
  });
  setVerifikasi(verifs);

  const ae = document.getElementById('verifAlert');
  const am = document.getElementById('verifAlertMsg');
  if (ae && am) {
    am.textContent = `Verifikasi "${usaha.nama}" berhasil disimpan. ${fotos.length} foto terlampir.`;
    ae.style.display = 'flex';
    setTimeout(() => { ae.style.display = 'none'; }, 5000);
  }

  fotos = [];
  renderVerifTable();
  renderDataTable();
  clearVerifForm();
  refreshFotoGrid();
}

function clearVerifForm() {
  ['verifUsaha','verifAktif','verifKBLI','verifDokumen','verifHasil'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = ''; });
  ['verifPetugas','verifCatatan'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.value = ''; });
  const tv = document.getElementById('verifTanggal'); if (tv) tv.value = todayISO();
  fotos = [];
  refreshFotoGrid();
}

function renderVerifTable() {
  const verifs = getVerifikasi();
  const tbody = document.getElementById('verifTableBody'); if (!tbody) return;
  if (!verifs.length) {
    tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:20px;">Belum ada riwayat verifikasi lapangan.</td></tr>';
    return;
  }
  const bh = h => h === 'Memenuhi Syarat' ? 'badge-success' : (h === 'Belum Memenuhi Syarat' || h === 'Ketidaksesuaian KBLI') ? 'badge-danger' : 'badge-warning';
  const bk = k => k === 'Sesuai' ? 'badge-success' : k === 'Tidak Sesuai' ? 'badge-danger' : 'badge-warning';
  tbody.innerHTML = verifs.map(v => {
    const fc = v.fotos ? v.fotos.length : 0;
    const fb = fc > 0 ? `<button class="btn btn-sm" style="padding:4px 9px;font-size:10px;" onclick="showVerifFotos(${v.id})"><i class="fa-solid fa-images"></i> ${fc}</button>` : `<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;">—</span>`;
    const cat = v.catatan || '';
    return `<tr>
      <td style="font-weight:600;">${esc(v.nama)}</td>
      <td>${esc(v.petugas)}</td><td>${esc(v.tgl)}</td>
      <td><span class="badge ${bh(v.hasil)}">${esc(v.hasil)}</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge ${bk(v.kbliMatch)}">${esc(v.kbliMatch)}</span></td>
      <td>${fb}</td>
      <td style="max-width:160px;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);">${esc(cat.length > 55 ? cat.slice(0, 55) + '...' : cat)}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

// ========== FIX: FOTO VIEWER — gallery navigation ==========
function showVerifFotos(id) {
  const verifs = getVerifikasi();
  const v = verifs.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!v || !v.fotos || !v.fotos.length) { alert('Tidak ada foto untuk verifikasi ini.'); return; }
  fotoViewerList = v.fotos;
  fotoViewerIdx = 0;
  renderFotoViewer();
  document.getElementById('fotoViewer').classList.add('open');
}
function renderFotoViewer() {
  const f = fotoViewerList[fotoViewerIdx];
  if (!f) return;
  document.getElementById('fotoViewerImg').src = f.dataUrl;
  document.getElementById('fotoViewerCaption').textContent = (f.name || 'Foto lapangan') + (f.time ? ' · ' + new Date(f.time).toLocaleString('id-ID') : '');
  const nav = document.getElementById('fotoViewerNav');
  const ctr = document.getElementById('fotoViewerCounter');
  if (fotoViewerList.length > 1) {
    nav.style.display = 'flex';
    ctr.textContent = (fotoViewerIdx + 1) + ' / ' + fotoViewerList.length;
  } else {
    nav.style.display = 'none';
  }
}
function navFotoViewer(dir) {
  fotoViewerIdx = (fotoViewerIdx + dir + fotoViewerList.length) % fotoViewerList.length;
  renderFotoViewer();
}
function openFotoViewer(url, caption) {
  fotoViewerList = [{ dataUrl: url, name: caption }];
  fotoViewerIdx = 0;
  document.getElementById('fotoViewerImg').src = url;
  document.getElementById('fotoViewerCaption').textContent = caption || '';
  document.getElementById('fotoViewerNav').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('fotoViewer').classList.add('open');
}
function closeFotoViewer() { document.getElementById('fotoViewer').classList.remove('open'); }

// ========== FOTO ==========
function refreshFotoGrid() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('fotoGrid'); if (!grid) return;
  const cnt = document.getElementById('fotoCount');
  if (!fotos.length) {
    grid.innerHTML = '<div class="foto-empty"><i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i>Belum ada foto.<br>Gunakan kamera atau pilih dari galeri.</div>';
    if (cnt) cnt.textContent = '';
    return;
  }
  if (cnt) cnt.textContent = fotos.length + ' foto terlampir';
  grid.innerHTML = fotos.map((f, i) => `
    <div class="foto-thumb" onclick="openFotoViewer('${f.dataUrl.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${esc(f.name)}')">
      <img src="${f.dataUrl}" alt="${esc(f.name)}" loading="lazy">
      <button class="foto-del" onclick="event.stopPropagation();deleteFoto(${i})" title="Hapus foto"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
      <div class="foto-label">${esc(f.name || 'Foto ' + (i + 1))}</div>
    </div>`).join('');
}
function deleteFoto(i) { fotos.splice(i, 1); refreshFotoGrid(); }

function handleFotoFile(event) {
  const files = Array.from(event.target.files);
  if (!files.length) return;
  let loaded = 0;
  files.forEach(file => {
    if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) { loaded++; if (loaded === files.length) refreshFotoGrid(); return; }
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = e => {
      const img = new Image();
      img.onload = () => {
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        const MAX = 900;
        let w = img.width, h = img.height;
        if (w > MAX) { h = Math.round(h * MAX / w); w = MAX; }
        if (h > MAX) { w = Math.round(w * MAX / h); h = MAX; }
        canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;
        canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);
        fotos.push({ dataUrl: canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.75), name: file.name, time: new Date().toISOString() });
        loaded++;
        if (loaded === files.length) refreshFotoGrid();
      };
      img.src = e.target.result;
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
  event.target.value = '';
}

let cameraStream = null;
function openCamera() {
  if (!navigator.mediaDevices || !navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia) {
    alert('Kamera tidak tersedia.\n\nPastikan:\n1. Menggunakan Chrome/Firefox terbaru\n2. Buka via HTTPS atau localhost\n3. Izin kamera sudah diberikan\n\nAlternatif: gunakan "Pilih dari Galeri".');
    return;
  }
  navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: { facingMode: 'environment', width: { ideal:1280 }, height: { ideal:720 } }, audio: false })
    .then(stream => {
      cameraStream = stream;
      const video = document.getElementById('cameraVideo');
      video.srcObject = stream;
      document.getElementById('cameraPreviewWrap').style.display = 'block';
    })
    .catch(err => {
      const msgs = { NotAllowedError:'Izin kamera ditolak. Klik ikon kunci di address bar browser dan izinkan akses kamera.', NotFoundError:'Kamera tidak ditemukan. Pastikan perangkat memiliki kamera.', NotReadableError:'Kamera sedang digunakan aplikasi lain. Tutup aplikasi kamera lain terlebih dahulu.' };
      alert((msgs[err.name] || 'Gagal membuka kamera: ' + err.message) + '\n\nGunakan "Pilih dari Galeri" sebagai alternatif.');
    });
}
function stopCamera() {
  if (cameraStream) { cameraStream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); cameraStream = null; }
  const wrap = document.getElementById('cameraPreviewWrap');
  if (wrap) wrap.style.display = 'none';
}
function closeCamera() { stopCamera(); }
function capturePhoto() {
  const video = document.getElementById('cameraVideo');
  const canvas = document.getElementById('cameraCanvas');
  if (!video || !video.videoWidth) { alert('Kamera belum siap. Tunggu sebentar.'); return; }
  const MAX = 900;
  let w = video.videoWidth, h = video.videoHeight;
  if (w > MAX) { h = Math.round(h * MAX / w); w = MAX; }
  canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;
  canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(video, 0, 0, w, h);
  const ts = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('id-ID', { hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', second:'2-digit' }).replace(/:/g,'.');
  fotos.push({ dataUrl: canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.82), name: `Foto_${ts}`, time: new Date().toISOString() });
  refreshFotoGrid();
  // Flash
  const wrap = document.getElementById('cameraPreviewWrap');
  wrap.style.filter = 'brightness(2.5)';
  setTimeout(() => { wrap.style.filter = ''; }, 120);
}

// ========== CLEAR / RESET ==========
function confirmClearAll() {
  if (!confirm('⚠️ PERINGATAN KERAS!\n\nSemua data akan dihapus permanen:\n• Data persetujuan\n• Riwayat verifikasi\n• Semua foto lapangan\n\nTindakan ini TIDAK DAPAT dibatalkan!\n\nLanjutkan?')) return;
  localStorage.removeItem('veritas_persetujuan');
  localStorage.removeItem('veritas_verifikasi');
  localStorage.removeItem('veritas_kbli');
  fotos = [];
  renderDataTable(); renderVerifTable(); renderKbliTable();
  refreshFotoGrid(); refreshDashboard(); updateStorageInfo();
  alert('✓ Semua data telah dihapus.');
}
function resetVerifikasi() {
  if (!confirm('Hapus semua data verifikasi? Data persetujuan tidak terpengaruh.')) return;
  localStorage.removeItem('veritas_verifikasi');
  renderVerifTable(); updateStorageInfo();
  alert('✓ Data verifikasi dihapus.');
}

// ========== EXPORT CSV ==========
function exportTableToCSV(tableId, filename) {
  const table = document.getElementById(tableId);
  if (!table) { alert('Tabel tidak ditemukan'); return; }
  let csv = '';
  table.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(row => {
    const cols = row.querySelectorAll('th,td');
    csv += Array.from(cols).map(col => `"${col.innerText.replace(/\n/g,' ').replace(/"/g,'""').trim()}"`).join(',') + '\n';
  });
  downloadCSV(csv, filename);
}
function exportVerifCSV() {
  const verifs = getVerifikasi();
  if (!verifs.length) { alert('Belum ada data verifikasi untuk diekspor.'); return; }
  let csv = '"Nama Usaha","Kecamatan","KBLI","Petugas","Tanggal","Aktif","Kesesuaian KBLI","Dokumen","Hasil","Jumlah Foto","Catatan"\n';
  verifs.forEach(v => {
    csv += [v.nama,v.kec,v.kbli,v.petugas,v.tgl,v.aktif,v.kbliMatch,v.dokumen,v.hasil,(v.fotos?v.fotos.length:0),v.catatan]
      .map(x => `"${String(x||'').replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(',') + '\n';
  });
  downloadCSV(csv, 'Hasil_Verifikasi_' + todayISO() + '.csv');
}
function downloadCSV(csv, filename) {
  const blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF' + csv], { type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = filename; a.click();
  setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 1000);
}

// ========== SOP DOWNLOAD ==========
function downloadSOP() {
  const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="id"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title>SOP VERITAS v3 — DLH TTS</title>
  <style>body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;max-width:800px;margin:40px auto;padding:0 30px;color:#152030;}
  h1{color:#135E84;border-bottom:3px solid #8FD9FB;padding-bottom:12px;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .meta{font-size:13px;color:#5A7A90;margin-bottom:28px;}
  .step{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:20px;padding:16px;background:#EEF7FD;border-radius:10px;border-left:4px solid #2A9ED8;}
  .num{background:#2A9ED8;color:white;border-radius:50%;width:32px;height:32px;min-width:32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;}
  h4{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;color:#152030;}
  p{font-size:13px;line-height:1.7;color:#4A6070;margin:0;}
  .footer{margin-top:40px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #D0DCE7;font-size:11px;color:#7A93A8;text-align:center;}

.topbar-left h1 { color: #1B3F72 !important; font-weight: 700 !important; }
.topbar-left p { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.sync-pill { background: #E8F5E9 !important; border-color: #A5D6A7 !important; color: #2E7D32 !important; }
.date-badge { background: #F4F7FA !important; border-color: #D6E0EC !important; color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.user-avatar { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B3F72, #1a56a0) !important; }
.user-detail strong { color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.user-detail small { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.logout-btn { border-color: #D6E0EC !important; color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.logout-btn:hover { border-color: #EA5455 !important; color: #EA5455 !important; }


/* ── INSTANSI HEADER ── */
.instansi-header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B3F72 0%, #1a4d8f 60%, #1a6faa 100%) !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(27,63,114,.18) !important;
}
.inst-emblem {
  width: 62px !important; height: 62px !important;
  background: #FFFFFF !important; border: none !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important; overflow: hidden !important;
  display: flex !important; align-items: center !important; justify-content: center !important;
}
.inst-emblem i { display: none !important; }
.inst-emblem::after {
  content: '' !important; display: block !important;
  width: 56px !important; height: 56px !important;
  background: url("data:image/png;base64,") center/contain no-repeat !important;
}
.inst-text .il1 { color: rgba(255,255,255,.60) !important; }
.inst-text .il2 { color: #FFFFFF !important; }
.inst-text .il3 { color: rgba(255,255,255,.85) !important; }
.inst-text .il4 { color: rgba(255,255,255,.50) !important; }


/* ── STAT CARDS ── */
.stat-card { background: #FFFFFF !important; border: 1px solid #E4EDF5 !important; border-radius: 14px !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(27,63,114,.07) !important; }
.stat-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(27,63,114,.13) !important; transform: translateY(-2px) !important; }
.stat-card::after { height: 4px !important; }
.stat-card.blue::after   { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1B3F72, #2196F3) !important; }
.stat-card.green::after  { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1A9E55, #28C76F) !important; }
.stat-card.orange::after { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #D97706, #FF9F43) !important; }
.stat-card.red::after    { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #C93A3A, #EA5455) !important; }
.stat-card.blue   .stat-number { color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.stat-card.green  .stat-number { color: #1A9E55 !important; }
.stat-card.orange .stat-number { color: #C97006 !important; }
.stat-card.red    .stat-number { color: #C93A3A !important; }
.stat-label { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.stat-desc  { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.stat-icon  { opacity: .06 !important; }


/* ── PANELS ── */
.panel { background: #FFFFFF !important; border: 1px solid #E4EDF5 !important; border-radius: 14px !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(27,63,114,.06) !important; }
.panel-title { color: #1B3F72 !important; border-bottom: 2px solid #EBF3FC !important; }
.panel-title i { color: #1a56a0 !important; }
.panel-header-row { border-bottom: 2px solid #EBF3FC !important; }


/* ── TABLE ── */
table th { background: #F4F7FA !important; color: #1B3F72 !important; border-bottom: 2px solid #C8DDF0 !important; }
table td { border-bottom: 1px solid #E4EDF5 !important; }
table tr.clickable-row:hover td { background: #EBF3FC !important; }


/* ── BADGES ── */
.badge-success { background: #E8F5E9 !important; color: #2E7D32 !important; }
.badge-warning { background: #FFF8E1 !important; color: #E65100 !important; }
.badge-danger  { background: #FFEBEE !important; color: #C62828 !important; }
.badge-info    { background: #EBF3FC !important; color: #1B3F72 !important; }


/* ── STORAGE ── */
.storage-bar { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1B3F72, #2196F3) !important; }
.storage-bar-wrap { background: #E4EDF5 !important; }


/* ── RINGKASAN ── */
.ring-item { background: #EBF3FC !important; border: 1px solid #C8DDF0 !important; border-radius: 10px !important; }
.ring-label { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.ring-value { color: #1B3F72 !important; }


/* ── FORM ── */
.form-group label { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.form-group input,.form-group select,.form-group textarea { border: 1.5px solid #D6E0EC !important; border-radius: 8px !important; background: #fff !important; color: #152030 !important; }
.form-group input:focus,.form-group select:focus,.form-group textarea:focus { border-color: #1a56a0 !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,160,.10) !important; }


/* ── BUTTONS ── */
.btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B3F72, #1a56a0) !important; border-radius: 8px !important; }
.btn-success { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A9E55, #28C76F) !important; }
.btn-danger  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C93A3A, #EA5455) !important; }
.btn-export  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A9E55, #28C76F) !important; }
.btn-outline { border: 1.5px solid #1a56a0 !important; color: #1B3F72 !important; background: none !important; border-radius: 8px !important; }
.btn-outline:hover { background: #EBF3FC !important; }


/* ── ALERTS ── */
.alert-info    { background: #EBF3FC !important; border-color: #C8DDF0 !important; color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.alert-warning { background: #FFF8E1 !important; border-color: #FFE082 !important; color: #5D3200 !important; }
.alert-success { background: #E8F5E9 !important; border-color: #A5D6A7 !important; color: #2E7D32 !important; }


/* ── UPLOAD ── */
.upload-tabs { background: #EBF3FC !important; border-color: #C8DDF0 !important; }
.upload-tab.active { background: #FFFFFF !important; color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.upload-tab { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.upload-area { background: #EBF3FC !important; border-color: #C8DDF0 !important; }
.upload-area p { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }


/* ── FOTO ── */
.foto-section { background: #EBF3FC !important; border-color: #C8DDF0 !important; }
.foto-section-title { color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.foto-btn { border-color: #C8DDF0 !important; color: #1B3F72 !important; background: #fff !important; }
.foto-btn:hover { background: #1B3F72 !important; color: #fff !important; border-color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.foto-btn.primary-foto { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B3F72, #1a56a0) !important; color: #fff !important; border: none !important; }


/* ── MODAL ── */
.modal-overlay { background: rgba(27,63,114,.45) !important; }
.modal-box { border-radius: 16px !important; border-color: #C8DDF0 !important; }
.modal-header { border-bottom: 2px solid #EBF3FC !important; border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0 !important; }
.modal-header h2 { color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.detail-section-title { color: #1B3F72 !important; border-bottom-color: #EBF3FC !important; }
.detail-item label { color: #6B8FA8 !important; }


/* ── SOP & ROADMAP ── */
.sop-num { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B3F72, #1a56a0) !important; }
.sop-step { border-bottom-color: #EBF3FC !important; }
.rm-done { background: #E8F5E9 !important; color: #2E7D32 !important; }
.rm-todo { background: #F4F7FA !important; color: #6B8FA8 !important; border-color: #D6E0EC !important; }
.tag-done   { background: #E8F5E9 !important; color: #2E7D32 !important; }
.tag-active { background: #EBF3FC !important; color: #1B3F72 !important; }
.tag-todo   { background: #F4F7FA !important; color: #6B8FA8 !important; }
.tujuan-list li { background: #EBF3FC !important; border-left-color: #1a56a0 !important; }
.tujuan-list li i { color: #1a56a0 !important; }
.roadmap-item { border-bottom-color: #E4EDF5 !important; }


/* ── BG ── */
body { background: #F4F7FA !important; }
.content { background: #F4F7FA !important; }
.main { background: #F4F7FA !important; }

</style></head><body>
  <h1>SOP Verifikasi Lapangan — VERITAS v3</h1>
  <div class="meta"><strong>Instansi:</strong> Dinas Lingkungan Hidup Kabupaten Timor Tengah Selatan &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Tahun:</strong> 2025</div>
  <div class="step"><div class="num">1</div><div><h4>Persiapan Administrasi</h4><p>Petugas DLH menyiapkan daftar usaha/kegiatan dari data OSS/Amdalnet, membawa surat tugas resmi dari Kepala Dinas, dan menyiapkan formulir verifikasi.</p></div></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="num">2</div><div><h4>Koordinasi dengan Pemilik Usaha</h4><p>Menghubungi penanggung jawab usaha untuk menjadwalkan kunjungan dan menginformasikan dokumen yang harus disiapkan (SPPL, UKL-UPL, atau AMDAL).</p></div></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="num">3</div><div><h4>Kunjungan, Observasi & Dokumentasi Foto</h4><p>Kunjungi lokasi, verifikasi aktivitas usaha, dan ambil foto lapangan langsung dari menu Verifikasi VERITAS menggunakan kamera HP atau upload galeri.</p></div></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="num">4</div><div><h4>Pemeriksaan Dokumen Lingkungan</h4><p>Periksa ketersediaan dan kesesuaian SPPL/UKL-UPL/AMDAL. Verifikasi kesesuaian kode KBLI dengan kegiatan aktual di lapangan.</p></div></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="num">5</div><div><h4>Input Hasil Verifikasi ke VERITAS</h4><p>Input hasil verifikasi di menu Verifikasi + Foto: isi status kepatuhan, kesesuaian KBLI, catatan temuan, dan lampirkan foto. Data tersimpan otomatis tanpa Google Sheet.</p></div></div>
  <div class="step"><div class="num">6</div><div><h4>Pelaporan dan Tindak Lanjut</h4><p>Laporkan ke Kepala Bidang. Temuan ketidaksesuaian KBLI atau pelanggaran diteruskan ke Tim Pengawasan untuk tindak lanjut administratif.</p></div></div>
  <div class="footer">VERITAS v3.0 — DLH Kabupaten Timor Tengah Selatan © 2025</div>
  </body></html>`;
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = 'data:text/html;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(html);
  a.download = 'SOP_Verifikasi_VERITAS_v3.html'; a.click();
}

// ========== KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS ==========
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    closeDetailModal();
    closeFotoViewer();
    stopCamera();
  }
  if (document.getElementById('fotoViewer').classList.contains('open')) {
    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') navFotoViewer(-1);
    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') navFotoViewer(1);
  }
});

// ========== INIT STORAGE DISPLAY ==========
updateStorageInfo();
</script>
</body>
</html>
